name: Watermelon Ice Drink
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and coarsely chop the watermelon in a bowl, saving all the juices.
2. Add the chopped watermelon and crushed ice to a blender.
3. Blend until smooth.
4. Pour into 2 tall glasses.
5. Garnish with rose geranium leaves if desired.
6. Serve immediately with long spoons.
